input.prompt:
Explore the git worktree at .claude/worktrees/wt-connect-powerbi-web in the repo at /Users/juliano.barbosa/Repos/azure/microsoft-copilot-cowork/finops. I need to understand:

1. Run: git worktree list
2. Run: git -C /Users/juliano.barbosa/Repos/azure/microsoft-copilot-cowork/finops/.claude/worktrees/wt-connect-powerbi-web log --oneline main..HEAD (or main..HEAD equivalent)
3. Run: git -C /Users/juliano.barbosa/Repos/azure/microsoft-copilot-cowork/finops/.claude/worktrees/wt-connect-powerbi-web status
4. Run: git -C /Users/juliano.barbosa/Repos/azure/microsoft-copilot-cowork/finops/.claude/worktrees/wt-connect-powerbi-web diff main --stat

Report back:
- The worktree path and branch name
- All commits ahead of main
- Any uncommitted changes
- A summary of what files changed vs main

input.description: Check diff stat vs main in worktree

input.command: git -C /Users/juliano.barbosa/Repos/azure/microsoft-copilot-cowork/finops/.claude/worktrees/wt-connect-powerbi-web status --short 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^D " | grep -v "^ D" | head -60
input.description: Show only additions/modifications in worktree status
Check worktree list from main repo

input.command: git -C /Users/juliano.barbosa/Repos/azure/microsoft-copilot-cowork/finops/.claude/worktrees/wt-connect-powerbi-web log --oneline main..HEAD 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; git -C /Users/juliano.barbosa/Repos/azure/microsoft-copilot-cowork/finops/.claude/worktrees/wt-connect-powerbi-web log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null
input.description: Check commits on worktree branch vs main

input.content:
# Plan: Finish worktree wt-connect-powerbi-web

## Context

The worktree `.claude/worktrees/wt-connect-powerbi-web` (branch `worktree-wt-connect-powerbi-web`) was created for Power BI web connectivity work. It has **0 commits ahead of main** — no committed work exists on this branch. The worktree contains only untracked artifacts:
- Screenshots: `azure-*.png`, `powerbi-*.png`, etc. (44 files)
- YAML snapshots: `dialog-snapshot.yml`, `jan-snapshot.yml`, `usage-by-subs-snapshot.yml`
- `.playwright-mcp/` directory
- One conflicted crdownload file (staged as new + deleted)

## Finding

Since there are no commits to merge, the merge is a no-op. The real question is what to do with the untracked files and the worktree itself.

## Options

Present to user:

1. **Merge locally (no-op)** — branch is at same commit as main; just remove the worktree and delete the branch.
2. **Commit untracked files first, then merge** — stage the screenshots/snapshots, commit to the branch, then merge into main.
3. **Keep worktree as-is** — preserve the worktree for later work.
4. **Discard** — remove worktree and branch, losing all untracked artifacts.

## Recommended Steps (Option 1 — clean removal)

```bash
# From main repo root
git worktree remove .claude/worktrees/wt-connect-powerbi-web
git branch -d worktree-wt-connect-powerbi-web
```

## Verification

- `git worktree list` should show only main and other remaining worktrees
- `git branch` should not show `worktree-wt-connect-powerbi-web`

allowedPrompts.prompt: remove git worktree and delete branch
